import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted_unique(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(sorted, x)
    sorted
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < sorted.len()
      let v = match sorted.get(i)
      when Some(val)
        val
      when None
        0
      end
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let num = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(n)
        n
      when None
        0
      end
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        sorted = insert_sorted_unique(sorted, num)
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    let v = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(val)
      val
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
